name: Dark mode for mobile app
description: As a user I want a dark theme to reduce eye strain at night
acceptanceCriteria: Theme toggle in settings, persists across sessions, covers all screens

name: Bulk export to CSV
description: As an admin I want to export all data to CSV for reporting
acceptanceCriteria: Export button on dashboard, includes all fields, max 10000 rows

name: Onboarding checklist for new users
description: As a new user I want a guided checklist to discover core features
acceptanceCriteria: Checklist on first login, tracks completion, dismissable, 5 key actions

name: Password reset via email
description: As a user I want to reset my password via email
acceptanceCriteria: Reset link sent within 60s, expires in 1 hour, works on all email clients

name: In-app push notifications
description: As a user I want to receive relevant in-app alerts
acceptanceCriteria: Permission prompt on first login, notification centre, mark as read

name: Advanced search and filters
description: As a power user I want to filter results by multiple criteria
acceptanceCriteria: Filter by date, status, owner, tag. Filters persist. Results update instantly

name: Two-factor authentication
description: As an admin I want to enforce 2FA for security compliance
acceptanceCriteria: TOTP support, SMS fallback, recovery codes, admin enforcement toggle

name: API access for developers
description: As a developer I want a REST API to integrate with internal tools
acceptanceCriteria: API key management, rate limiting, full CRUD on core entities, docs

name: Fix typo in settings page footer
description: Footer text says 'Setttings' instead of 'Settings'
acceptanceCriteria: Fix spelling

name: Migrate legacy billing service to new payment provider
description: Replace legacy payment API integration with new billing API across all payment flows
acceptanceCriteria: All checkout flows migrated, backward compatibility for existing subscriptions, zero-downtime cutover

name: Add confetti animation on task completion
description: Show a confetti animation when user completes a task

name: GDPR data deletion endpoint
notes: Legal deadline: must ship before EU launch
description: As a user I want to request full deletion of my data per GDPR Article 17
acceptanceCriteria: Deletion request completed within 30 days, cascades to all related records, audit log retained, email confirmation sent

name: Improve dashboard load time
notes: P95 load time is 4.2s, target under 1.5s
description: As a user I want the dashboard to load quickly so I don't lose focus
acceptanceCriteria: P95 load under 1.5s, no regression in data freshness, works across all supported browsers

name: Add emoji reactions to comments
notes: Requested by 12 users in feedback board
description: As a user I want to react to comments with emojis
acceptanceCriteria: Pick from 6 standard emojis, one reaction per user per comment, reaction counts visible

name: Real-time collaborative editing
notes: Top ask from enterprise prospects in sales calls
description: As a team I want multiple people to edit the same document simultaneously
acceptanceCriteria: Cursor presence, conflict-free merge, works with 10+ concurrent editors, offline reconciliation

name: Update footer copyright year
description: Footer shows 2025, should show 2026
acceptanceCriteria: Update year

name: SSO with Okta and Azure AD
description: As an enterprise admin I want SAML/SSO login via Okta or Azure AD
acceptanceCriteria: SAML 2.0 support, just-in-time provisioning, admin config UI, works alongside existing email/password login

name: Rewrite internal admin tool in React
notes: Current tool is jQuery, hard to maintain
description: As an internal team we want the admin tool rebuilt in React for maintainability
acceptanceCriteria: Feature parity with current tool, internal only, no external user impact

name: Add keyboard shortcuts for power users
description: As a power user I want keyboard shortcuts for common actions
acceptanceCriteria: Shortcuts for create, search, navigate; shortcut cheat sheet modal; customizable bindings

name: AI-powered smart replies
description: As a user I want AI-suggested quick replies in comments

name: Encrypt data at rest for all customer records
description: As a compliance officer I want all customer PII encrypted at rest using AES-256
acceptanceCriteria: All PII fields encrypted at rest, key rotation supported, no performance regression over 5%, passes next SOC2 audit

name: Change primary button color from blue to teal
description: Rebrand: update primary CTA color across app
acceptanceCriteria: Update design tokens, verify contrast ratios still pass WCAG AA

name: Multi-currency support for billing
notes: Blocking expansion into EU and APAC markets
description: As an international customer I want to be billed in my local currency
acceptanceCriteria: Support USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD; correct tax calculation per region; historical invoices unaffected

name: Undo button for destructive actions
notes: 180 support tickets per month about accidental deletes
description: As a user I want to undo accidental deletions within a time window
acceptanceCriteria: 30-second undo toast after delete, works for records/comments/attachments, no data loss risk
